children.text: representatives of research and academic institutions;
business communities, including the insurance industry.
trends and developments in the natural, engineering, and social sciences and practices of windstorm impact mitigation;
the priorities of the Program’s Strategic Plan;
the effectiveness of the Program in meeting its purposes; and
any revisions to the Program which may be necessary.

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: c Compensation
children.text: The members of the Advisory Committee established under this section shall serve without compensation.

children.heading: Reports
children.label: d Reports
children.text: At least every 2 years, the Advisory Committee shall report to the Director on the assessments carried out under subsection (b) and its recommendations for ways to improve the Program.

children.heading: Charter
children.label: e Charter
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Advisory Committee shall not be required to file a charter subsequent to its initial charter, filed under , before the termination date specified in subsection (f) of this section.section 1013(b)(2) of title 5section 1008(c) of title 5

children.heading: Termination
children.label: f Termination
children.text: The Advisory Committee shall terminate on .September 30, 2017

children.heading: Conflict of interest
children.label: g Conflict of interest
children.text: An Advisory Committee member shall recuse himself from any Advisory Committee activity in which he has an actual pecuniary interest.
